## Attestor PR Contract

### Status
Mode:
Tracker:
Step:
Progress:
Source of truth: origin/master
Evidence state:
Next:

### Scope
Newest user/request in operational terms:

### Trust surface
Affected trust surface:
Protected principle:

### Claim labels
- repo-proven:
- partial-repo:
- source-backed:
- inferred:
- not proven:
- contradicted:
- blocked:
- design-hypothesis:
- novel-construct:

### Evidence
Repository evidence checked:

Official / primary sources checked:

### Changes
Files changed:

Files intentionally not touched:

### Tests / checks
- [ ] targeted tests:
- [ ] npm run typecheck:
- [ ] npm run typecheck:hygiene:
- [ ] npm run verify, if broad trust-sensitive change:

### Readiness classification
- [ ] contract-ready
- [ ] runtime-wired
- [ ] ci-verified
- [ ] production-ready

### No-claims / limitations
What this PR does NOT prove:

Remaining blockers:

### Dependency review
Dependency PR: no
Release notes / changelog / advisory checked:
Lockfile / manifest diff checked:
Runtime / security / build / action surface touched:

### Human admission
Merge classification:
- [ ] safe small change
- [ ] trust-sensitive change
- [ ] contract-only
- [ ] runtime-wired
- [ ] docs/readiness claim change
- [ ] blocked / do not merge yet

Final decision:
- [ ] OK to merge
- [ ] Do not merge yet
